message: feat: add exact agent message addressing

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+import type { AgentAddress } from "../../src/bus/types.ts";
+
+export function addr(
+	agentName: string,
+	depth: number,
+	role?: "observer",
+	handleId = agentName,
+	agentId = handleId,
+): AgentAddress {
+	return {
+		agentName,
+		depth,
+		handleId,
+		agentId,
+		...(role ? { role } : {}),
+	};
+}
